Description: Shows the total number of <enrollmentSparseSubmitRequestRecord> in a single xml file
Shows the unique ID for each record inside, GUID
Shows the unique ID for each record inside, GUID
Map from Claims SubscriberID Number(Field No 2)
This will be GUID for each record inside <enrollmentSparseSubmitRequestRecord> tag. It should be different from recordid

Populate as 'Daily  OR Weekly'

File Naming Convention:
<ClientCode><FileType><CreatedDate><CreatedTime><Environment>.txt
<FileType> will be MBROUT for Daily file
<FileType> will be FULLMBROUT for Weekly file

Sample
Incremental File - BHPMBROUT202303151930P.txt
Full File - BHPFULLMBROUT202303151930P.txt

Leave it blank.
If needed Customers can populate corresponding state names using adaptor map . If populated, State Must be in Full name format (e.g., California, New York, Georgia)
